channel.title: Posts on Tundra
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Tundra

item.title: Start!
item.description: It’s maddening how often we underestimate the difficulty of starting a new or challenging task. A seemingly trivial step, because the only way to fail at trying is by not doing so. Yet consistently, many of us never make that first move. This is an important problem, usually treated as nothing more than scuff to brush off. The solution itself is well known, but knowing the anwser does not help much.
